mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_material (material_code, name, category_id, unit, spec, expiry_warning_days, min_stock, max_stock, image_url, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{materialCode}, #{name}, #{categoryId}, #{unit}, #{spec}, #{expiryWarningDays}, #{minStock}, #{maxStock}, #{imageUrl}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM wms_material WHERE material_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, c.category_name, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.quantity), 0) FROM wms_stock_item s WHERE s.material_id = m.material_id AND s.status = 1) as current_stock FROM wms_material m LEFT JOIN wms_category c ON m.category_id = c.category_id WHERE m.material_id = #{materialId}
